title: Project A - Cobblemon
description: Enjoy a variety of Cobblemon-based content!
body:
<details>
<summary>English</summary>

## This modpack is based on Cobblemon 1.6.1. In 2027, I plan to update it by rebuilding the modpack from scratch based on Cobblemon 1.9.x!

## About Modpack
This modpack is **designed to make it easier and more fun to enjoy Cobblemon mod-based content.**\
It contains not only the Cobblemon add-on mods, but also quality and optimization mods and more.\
I've also tried to make sure that the different pieces of content work well together organically.

## Features
• With more than 30 Cobblemon add-on mods and data packs, you can enjoy even more Cobblemon-related content.\
• A variety of smooth animations and effects are added to entities and UI.\
• Various performance optimization modes and convenience modes for smoother gameplay.\
• Various options have been tweaked to improve the gameplay experience.

## Caveats
• The datapack included with the modpack must be applied to enjoy the full content.\
• If you experience a bug where skill descriptions are covered by buttons during battle, you can use the F3+T shortcut to fix it.\
• If you are experiencing severe lag, please restart Minecraft.

## Added Cobblemon contents
### Mods
• [CobbleFurnies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefurnies) - CobbleFurnies adds Cobblemon-themed furniture.\
• [Cobblemon - Show Held Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-held-items) - Shows your Pokémon's held items in the world.\
• [Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations) - Various mod integrations for Cobblemon.\
• [Cobblemon Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy) - Knowlogy Book addon with wiki information about the Cobblemon mod.\
• [Cobblemon Move Inspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-move-inspector) - Clientside in-battle move inspection for Cobblemon.\
• [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) - This mod adds all main-line Pokemon badges into Minecraft!\
• [Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav) - Adds items that provide various information about Cobblemon.\
• [Cobblemon Spawn Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification) - When a Legendary and/or Shiny Pokemon shows up, a message is broadcast to all players on the server.\
• [Cobblemon: Legends Untold](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-legendary-structures) - Adds legendary pokemon & their structures.\
• [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) - Adding mega evolutions to the game.\
• [Cobblemon: Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5) - Ride astride your Pokemon companions, as you travel by land, air or sea together!\
• [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding) - A side-mod for Cobblemon to add Pokémon breeding early.\
• [CobGyms](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobgyms) - Fight against randomised pre-built teams which scale to the level of your choosing in instanced Gym structures.\
• [LivelierPokemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/livelierpokemon) - Integrates Pokemon and Pokemon abilities into the world of Minecraft!\
• [MoreCobblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cobblemon-tweaks) - A qol cobblemon client mod introducing pc box names, wallpapers, and more!\
• [Pokeblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokeblocks) - Adds Pokemon-themed dolls/blocks to your world.\
• [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) - Over 700 unique and challenging trainers that will spawn naturally in your world.\
• [SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon) - SimpleTMs allows players to teach moves to their Pokémon in Cobblemon using TMs and TRs.

### Data Packs
• [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/allthemons-x-mega-showdown) - Always wanted to play Mega Showdown with AllTheMons? Well that's the version you have been waiting for!\
• [CobbledLoot [Cobblemon]](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledloot-cobblemon) - A more lightweight version of PokeLoot, featuring small loots that are scattered around the world that give you a reward!\
• [Cobblemon additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-additions) - A Datapack that adds villages with Pokemon Village/City variants.\
• [CobblemonLoot](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonloot) - Adds some Cobblemon items to vanilla chest loot tables.\
• [CobbleMotion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemotion) - A resource pack that adds simple idle animations to battle animations for Cobblemon models that do not have any.\
• [CobbleTowns: Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbletowns-continued) - Cobblemon datapack that adds Pokémon Centers, Marts, Towns, etc., based on towns from the main-line Pokémon games to Minecraft.\
• [Maxi's All Ride Mons](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-all-ride-mons) - This datapack adds the possibility to ride all current Pokémon found in the Cobblemon Mod.\
• [MysticMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mysticmons) - This pack includes models and animations for Pokemon currently not available in the base mod. Also enables Legendaries to spawn in the wild.\
• [RCT Badges - Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/rct-badges-cobblemonpokemonbadges) - Leaders from [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) will drop badges from the [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) mod.

### Resource Packs
• [CobbledGacha](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobbledgacha-bloos-gacha-machine-addon) - Change the look and drops of the gacha machine to fit Cobblemon gameplay!\
• [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface), [Cobblemon Interface: Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) - Cobblemon inspired GUI Textures and Sounds, Mod support for the Cobblemon Interface resourcepack.\
• [Maxi's JourneyMap Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/maxis-journeymap-cobblemon-icons) - Adds entity icons of Pokémon found in the Cobblemon Mod to JourneyMap in Pixel or Shuffle style!\
• [Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rct-trainer-textures-plus) - A resource pack for the latest version of the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod.

## System Requirements
|           |            Minimum Specifications           |         Recommended Specifications        |  
|:---------:|:-------------------------------------------:|:-----------------------------------------:|
|    CPU    |       12th Gen Intel® Core™ i3-12100      |12th Gen Intel® Core™ i5-12600K or better|
|    RAM    |             16GB(6GB allocation)            |       24GB(8GB allocation) or better      |
|    GPU    |Intel® UHD Graphics 730(Integrated Graphics)|     NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 or better     |

**I recommend an SSD and the latest graphics drivers.\
System Requirements can vary greatly depending on the shader settings.** 

</details>

<details>
<summary>한국어</summary>

## 이 모드팩은 코블몬 1.6.1 버전을 기반으로 만들어졌습니다. 2027년에 코블몬 1.9.x 버전 기준으로 모드팩을 처음부터 재구성하여 업데이트할 예정입니다!

## 모드팩에 대하여
이 모드팩은 **코블몬 모드 기반의 컨텐츠를 편하고 재미있게 즐길 수 있도록 만들어진 모드팩**입니다.\
코블몬 애드온 모드뿐만 아니라 감성 모드, 최적화 모드 등 다양한 모드가 포함되어 있습니다.\
또한 여러 컨텐츠가 서로 유기적으로 잘 작동할 수 있도록 하기 위해 노력하였습니다.

## 특징
• 30개 이상의 코블몬 애드온 모드와 데이터 팩으로 더욱 다양한 코블몬 관련 컨텐츠를 즐길 수 있습니다.\
• 엔티티와 UI에 여러 가지 부드러운 애니메이션과 효과가 추가됩니다.\
• 다양한 성능 최적화 모드와 편의 모드로 더욱 부드러운 게임 플레이가 가능합니다.\
• 게임 플레이 경험을 향상하기 위해 다양한 설정을 조절하였습니다.\
• **한국어로 플레이 시 글꼴 깨짐 현상을 방지하기 위한 글꼴 리소스팩을 추가하였습니다.**

## 주의 사항
• 모드팩에 포함된 데이터팩을 적용하셔야 완전한 컨텐츠를 즐기실 수 있습니다.\
• 배틀 중 스킬 설명이 버튼에 가리는 버그는 F3+T 단축키를 통해 해결하실 수 있습니다.\
• 렉이 심하게 발생하시는 경우 마인크래프트를 재시작하시기 바랍니다.

## 추가된 코블몬 컨텐츠
### 모드
• [CobbleFurnies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefurnies) - 코블몬 테마 가구를 추가합니다.\
• [Cobblemon - Show Held Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-held-items) - 월드에 있는 포켓몬의 보유 아이템을 표시합니다.\
• [Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations) - 코블몬을 위한 다양한 모드 호환 모드입니다.\
• [Cobblemon Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-knowlogy) - 코블몬 모드에 대한 위키 정보가 포함된 Knowlogy Book 모드 애드온입니다.\
• [Cobblemon Move Inspector](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-move-inspector) - 코블몬의 스킬 설명을 추가해줍니다.\
• [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) - 마인크래프트에 모든 메인 라인 포켓몬 배지를 추가합니다!\
• [Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav) - 코블몬에 관한 여러가지 정보를 알려주는 아이템을 추가합니다.\
• [Cobblemon Spawn Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification) - 전설 포켓몬 및 빛나는 포켓몬이 나타나면 서버의 모든 플레이어에게 메시지가 전송됩니다.\
• [Cobblemon: Legends Untold](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-legendary-structures) - 전설적인 포켓몬과 그 구조물을 추가합니다.\
• [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) - 게임에 메가 진화를 추가합니다.\
• [Cobblemon: Ride On!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonrider1.5) - 포켓몬 동료와 함께 육지, 공중 또는 바다를 여행하며 함께 이동하세요!\
• [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding) - 포켓몬을 조기에 육성할 수 있게 해주는 사이드 모드입니다.\
• [CobGyms](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobgyms) - 인스턴스 체육관 구조에서 원하는 레벨로 확장되는 무작위로 미리 구성된 팀과 전투를 벌이세요.\
• [LivelierPokemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/livelierpokemon) - 마인크래프트 세계에 포켓몬과 포켓몬의 능력을 통합하세요!\
• [MoreCobblemonTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-cobblemon-tweaks) - PC 박스 이름, 배경화면 등을 소개하는 QoL 코블몬 클라이언트 모드!\
• [Pokeblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokeblocks) - 포켓몬 테마의 인형/블록을 월드에 추가합니다.\
• [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) - 700개 이상의 독특하고 도전적인 트레이너가 여러분의 월드에 자연스럽게 생성됩니다.\
• [SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon) - 플레이어는 TM과 TR을 사용하여 코블몬에서 포켓몬에게 기술을 가르칠 수 있습니다.

### 데이터 팩
• [AllTheMons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/allthemons-x-mega-showdown) - 항상 올더몬즈와 메가 쇼다운을 플레이하고 싶었나요? 바로 여러분이 기다리셨던 버전입니다!\
• [CobbledLoot [Cobblemon]](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbledloot-cobblemon) - 전 세계에 흩어져 있는 작은 전리품으로 보상을 획득할 수 있는 보다 가벼운 버전의 포케루트입니다!\
• [Cobblemon additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-additions) - 포켓몬 마을을 추가하는 데이터팩입니다.\
• [CobblemonLoot](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonloot) - 바닐라 상자 전리품 테이블에 일부 코블몬 아이템을 추가합니다.\
• [CobbleMotion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemotion) - 간단한 유휴 애니메이션이 없는 코블몬 모델의 전투 애니메이션에 간단한 유휴 애니메이션을 추가하는 리소스 팩입니다.\
• [CobbleTowns: Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbletowns-continued) - 마인크래프트에 본편 포켓몬스터 게임의 마을을 기반으로 포켓몬 센터, 마트, 마을 등을 추가하는 코블몬 데이터팩입니다.\
• [Maxi's All Ride Mons](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-all-ride-mons) - 이 데이터팩은 현재 코블몬 모드에서 발견되는 모든 포켓몬을 탈 수 있는 가능성을 추가합니다.\
• [MysticMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mysticmons) - 이 팩에는 현재 기본 모드에서 사용할 수 없는 포켓몬의 모델과 애니메이션이 포함되어 있습니다. 또한 전설 포켓몬을 야생에서 생성할 수 있습니다.\
• [RCT Badges - Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/rct-badges-cobblemonpokemonbadges) - [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod)의 리더는 [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) 모드에서 배지를 드롭합니다.

### 리소스 팩
• [CobbledGacha](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobbledgacha-bloos-gacha-machine-addon) - 코블몬 게임 플레이에 맞게 뽑기 기계의 모양과 드롭을 변경하세요!\
• [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface), [Cobblemon Interface: Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) - 코블몬에서 영감을 받은 GUI 텍스처와 사운드를 제공해주고, Cobblemon Interface 리소스 팩에 대한 모드 지원을 추가해주는 리소스 팩입니다.\
• [Maxi's JourneyMap Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/maxis-journeymap-cobblemon-icons) - 포켓몬의 아이콘을 픽셀 또는 셔플 스타일로 Journeymap에 추가합니다!\
• [Radical Cobblemon Trainer Textures Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rct-trainer-textures-plus) - 최신 버전의 Radical Cobblemon Trainers 모드를 위한 리소스 팩입니다. 

## 요구 사양
|           |         모드팩  최소 사양           |          모드팩  권장 사양           |  
|:---------:|:-----------------------------------:|:------------------------------------:|
|    CPU    |   12th Gen Intel® Core™ i3-12100  |12th Gen Intel® Core™ i5-12600K 이상|
|    RAM    |           16GB(6GB 할당)            |          24GB(8GB 할당) 이상         |
|    GPU    |Intel® UHD Graphics 730(내장 그래픽)|     NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 이상     |

**SSD와 최신 그래픽 드라이버 설치를 권장합니다.\
요구 사양은 셰이더 설정에 따라 크게 달라질 수 있습니다.** 

</details>
